back_translation: Therefore you, my child, be strong in the grace that is in Jesus Christ
And the things that you heard from me in front of many witnesses, entrust to faithful people, who will be able to teach others as well
Suffer hardship together like a good soldier of Jesus Christ
No soldier on duty is entangled with the affairs of daily life, because he wants to please the one who enlisted him as a soldier
And if anyone competes in athletic games, he will not receive the crown unless he competes according to the rules
The hardworking farmer should be the first to receive a share of the produce of cultivation
Consider what I say, for the Lord will give you understanding in all things
Remember Jesus Christ who was raised from the dead, who descended from David, according to my gospel
On account of that gospel, I endure suffering to the point of being imprisoned like a criminal. But the word of God cannot be imprisoned
For this reason I endure all things for the sake of those whom God has chosen, so that they may receive the salvation that is in Jesus Christ, with eternal glory as well
This saying is trustworthy, namely: if we died with him, we will also live with him
If we endure, we will reign together with him; if we deny him, he will also deny us
If we are unfaithful, he still remains faithful; he cannot deny himself
Remind them of these things, and charge them in the presence of the Lord that they not quarrel over words — which produces no benefit, but is harmful to the listeners
Be diligent to present yourself to God as one whom he approves, a worker who need not be ashamed, one who handles the word of truth rightly
But avoid talk that profanes the sacred and is empty, for such talk will lead to greater unrighteousness
And the talk of those people will spread like the disease of gangrene; among them are Hymenaeus and Philetus
Who have already missed the truth, by saying that the resurrection has already happened, and have destroyed the faith of some
Nevertheless, the firm foundation of God still stands, having these seals: 'The Lord knows those who are his,' and, 'Everyone who names the name of the Lord, let him turn away from unrighteousness'
In a large house, there are not only vessels of gold and silver, but also vessels of wood and clay — some used for honorable work, and some for ordinary work
Therefore, if anyone cleanses himself from these things, he will be a vessel for honorable work, sanctified, useful to the master, and prepared for every good work
Flee from the lusts of youth, and pursue righteousness, faith, love, and peace, together with all those who call on the name of the Lord with a pure heart
But reject foolish and ignorant disputes, for you know that they produce quarrels
A servant of the Lord should not be quarrelsome, but should be gentle to everyone, one able to teach, and one who endures wrongdoing
He must instruct those who oppose with gentleness; perhaps God may grant them repentance, that they may come to a knowledge of the truth
And they will return to soberness, and escape from the snare of the devil, the one who has captured them as prisoners according to his will
